case_title: HEIDE LYNN LIZARBE VS. JOHN MONTEJANO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2021 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO MAR-16-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HEIDE LYNN GADDY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN MONTEJANO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUAN MANUEL COVARRUBIAS IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED ON DEFENDANT JOHN MONTEJANO, THOUGH HE HAD A COPY OF THE CLAIM HE COULD NOT SAY WHEN IT GOT IT, NOR COULD THE PLAINTIFF PRODUCE A COPY OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED AT THIS TIME. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF HEIDI LYNN LIZARBE, NOW KNOWN AS HEIDI LYNN GADDY IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF FILED A DECLARATION CHANGING HER NAME TO HEIDE LYNN GADDY ON FEBRUARY 19, 2021 AND IS UPDATED IN THE COURT'S RECORDS. DEFENDANTS JOHN MONTEJANO AND JUAN MANUEL COVARRUBIAS ARE PRESENT. PURSUANT TO THE FEBRUARY 19, 2021 DISPOSITION, NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. THIS MATTER IS HEARD CONSECUTIVELY WITH THE RELATED CASE OF CSM-20-863728 LESLIE GADDY VS. JOHN MONTEJANO. JOHN MONTEJANO SERVES AS INTERPRETER FOR HIS FATHER JUAN MANUEL COVARRUBIAS FROM ENGLISH TO SPANISH. INTERPRETER OATH IS GIVEN TO JOHN MONTEJANO. PLAINTIFF'S STATE IN OPEN COURT THAT THE CORRECT ADDRESS FOR PLAINTIFFS IS 182 PADDON PLACE APT. 10, MARINA, CA 93933, MAINTENANCE IS PERFORMED UPDATING PLAINTIFF'S ADDRESS IN IJS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF NEW/CURRENT LAST NAME (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GADDY, HEIDE LYNN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $110.00 - SERVED JAN-15-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COVARRUBIAS, JUAN MANUEL
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GADDY, HEIDE LYNN AS TO DEFENDANT MONTEJANO, JOHN COVARRUBIAS, JUAN MANUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GADDY, HEIDE LYNN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COVARRUBIAS, JUAN MANUEL $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,185.00, DEFENDANT JOHN MONTEJANO IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR TO CURE SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT COVARRUBIAS, JUAN MANUEL
